overview: A professional hospital website for Ayushman Hospital featuring online appointment scheduling, medical department showcases, doctor profiles, and emergency contact features. Built to improve patient access to healthcare information and services.
features: Online appointment booking with department selection and availability calendar
Medical services showcase with dedicated department pages
Doctor directory with filterable profiles and individual doctor pages
Emergency hotline with one-click calling and 24/7 contact
Appointment confirmation with booking ID and local persistence
